title: Senior Doctor - Novartis India International Enterprises - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Novartis India International Enterprises - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at Novartis India International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Jaipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Novartis India International Enterprises:
Novartis India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Novartis India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
